name: Gotsu
recipeIngredient: 6 hot green chillies, slit and cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the eggplant into very tiny pieces.
2. Heat oil in a pan. Add mustard seeds and let them pop.
3. Add curry leaves, onions, and fry until onions become translucent.
4. Add tomatoes and chopped eggplant to the pan. Fry for another five minutes.
5. If using tamarind paste, add 1 cup and half of water or an equal quantity of extract from fresh pulp. Stir in turmeric, salt, and garlic.
6. Let the mixture simmer until the eggplant becomes soft and barely retains its shape.
7. Remove from heat.
Tomato-onion Gotsu can also be made with more tomatoes and onions instead of eggplant. Additional chillies may be added if desired.
